basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Candidates who have a Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering, Chemistry, Physics, or any branch of science/engineering from a recognized institute with a good scientific publication record, along with a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in Class 10th and 12th, are eligible to apply for these Post-Doctoral Fellow vacancies. The online application process for IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 is open and will remain available until 30 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering/Chemistry/Physics or any branch of science/engineering from a recognized institute with good scientific publication record, Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards, 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering/Chemistry/Physics or any branch of science/engineering from a recognized institute with a good scientific publication record. Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards. Minimum 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Post-Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering, Chemistry, Physics, or any branch of science/engineering from a recognized institute with a strong publication record. Additionally, a minimum of 60% in graduation and 55% in 10th and 12th grades are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 72,000 to Rs. 84,000.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Post-Doctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST, Women) for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Post-Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is IP/10147/Advt0211.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any branch of science or engineering apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering, Chemistry, Physics, or any branch of science/engineering are eligible to apply, provided they meet the other specified criteria.
